tips_en: I recommend starting with the personality perception paper (Paper 2), as its discovery of a stark 'Prejudice Gap'—models producing correct ratings without retrieving behavioral evidence—offers a critical lens for evaluating whether models in the other papers truly understand or merely correlate. This tension between superficial pattern-matching and genuine grounded reasoning directly parallels TransitLM's challenge of implicit spatial grounding and DelTA's attempt to amplify discriminative tokens over shared high-frequency noise.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读第二篇关于人格感知的论文，其揭示的'偏见鸿沟'——模型在不检索行为证据的情况下给出正确评分——为评判另外两项研究中模型是真理解还是伪相关提供了关键视角。这种表面模式匹配与真实 grounded 推理之间的张力，与 TransitLM 的隐式空间 grounding 挑战以及 DelTA 强调判别性 token 而非共享高频噪声的技术目标形成了直接呼应。
